base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of pause_dungeon_compass_map_icons — a ui from 1986 legend of zelda. 'MAP' label + 'COMPASS' label + map-acquired-icon + compass-acquired-icon. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
